summary: Tested Upload page bug fixes (BUG 1: blank page when analysis is null, BUG 2: blank page after upload). All features working correctly. Backend: 5/5 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - upload zone, 3-step loading animation, result card with risk score/findings/next steps, action buttons, and analysis-failed safety net.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with test@archer.com/password123
Backend: GET /api/cases returns cases list for authenticated user
Backend: POST /api/documents/upload accepts .txt files and extracts text correctly
Backend: POST /api/documents/upload returns analysis with risk_score, findings, next_steps
Backend: POST /api/documents/upload with user_context works correctly
Backend: POST /api/documents/upload handles invalid .docx gracefully (returns null analysis)
Frontend: Upload page renders with data-testid='upload-page'
Frontend: Drag/drop zone visible with data-testid='upload-zone'
Frontend: Browse files button visible with data-testid='browse-files-btn'
Frontend: Case selector visible with data-testid='case-select'
Frontend: User context textarea visible with data-testid='user-context-input'
Frontend: Document scanner section visible with data-testid='document-scanner-section'
Frontend: After file selection, 'Analyze document' button appears (data-testid='analyze-btn')
Frontend: 3-step loading animation shows: Reading document, Analyzing with AI, Generating Risk Score
Frontend: Analysis result card shows inline with Risk Score (65/100)
Frontend: Dimension scores displayed (Financial: 75, Urgency: 85, Legal strength: 40, Complexity: 60)
Frontend: Key insight section visible (data-testid='key-insight')
Frontend: Summary section visible
Frontend: Key findings with impact levels displayed
Frontend: Recommended next steps displayed
Frontend: 'View full case' button visible (data-testid='view-full-case-btn')
Frontend: 'Talk to a lawyer — $149' button visible (data-testid='talk-to-lawyer-btn')
Frontend: 'Upload another document' link visible (data-testid='upload-another-btn')
Frontend: analysis-failed card shows when result exists but analysis is null (data-testid='analysis-failed')

Regression: Login with email/password works
Regression: Dashboard loads with 8 active cases
Regression: My Cases page loads with cases list
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_upload_page.py (New test file for upload page bug fixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Upload page bug fixes verified. The page now has 3 rendering states: (1) showUploadForm when no result and not loading, (2) showLoading during upload with 3-step animation (Reading document, Analyzing with AI, Generating Risk Score), (3) showResult with full analysis card OR analysis-failed error card. The analysis-failed card (data-testid='analysis-failed') shows when result exists but analysis is null, preventing blank page. Backend extract_text_from_docx() function at line 963 handles .docx files. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_upload_page.py can be reused for regression testing.

bug_2_fix.status: FIXED - result card shows inline with all analysis data
